title: tabernaemontana pallida
intro: Tabernaemontana pallida, also known as the pale inside-out flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as voacanga. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana pallida include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infectious diseases. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
